flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at Lee University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.7k vs 3.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lee University fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4k → 2.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lee University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.5k → $23.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lee University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.5k → $23.8k).
